title: Steve Jobs
html: Stub. Apple co-founder. Cited in Yahir's earliest-fiction-piece 2020 03 06 short story as the source of the "Steve Jobsinian" compression-of-life ethos — "why live a 60 year life in 60 years when you can accomplish that in 20."

related.label: March 2023 thoughts — ChatGPT, becoming obsolete, generation-defining moment, Bill Gates's PC era
